overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through an overcast prairie landscape. The character travels along a dirt path beside a rocky hill, encounters horse riders and a carriage, and eventually reaches and follows a railroad track through the misty grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with dirt path alongside rocky hill

events.description: two riders on horses gallop past from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path with a large rocky hill to the left

notable_agents.action: two riders on horses galloping past from left to right along a parallel path

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop covered with sparse vegetation
muddy dirt trail winding through the grassland
tall evergreen trees dotting the prairie landscape
expansive field of tall yellow-brown grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through an open prairie with a rocky hill to the left and scattered pine trees in the distance. Two riders on horses suddenly gallop past from the left, crossing the field of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with utility poles lining the right side

events.description: horse-drawn wooden carriage passes by from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path as wooden utility poles become visible along the right side

notable_agents.action: wooden horse-drawn carriage with driver and passenger moving from left to right

entered.detail: tall wooden telegraph poles with crossbars and wires
foggy tree line visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the trail as the rocky hill recedes behind. Wooden utility poles line the right side of the path. A horse-drawn carriage passes by from the left, traveling in the same direction as the earlier riders.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching railroad tracks through open grassland

agents.ego_description: walking toward the railroad tracks that become visible ahead in the misty distance

entered.detail: metal railway tracks with wooden ties cutting across the prairie

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dirt path approaching a set of railroad tracks that run across the prairie. The utility poles continue alongside the path, now closer to the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: walking along raised railroad embankment through misty grassland

events.description: character steps off the dirt path and onto the railroad tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden railroad ties of the track, balancing on the rail line

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the railroad tracks and begins walking along the wooden ties. The dirt path is left behind as the character follows the rail line through the misty grassland, with utility poles continuing alongside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open prairie that gradually transitions from a dirt trail into a misty railroad corridor. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path beside a rocky hill and scattered pine trees, just as two riders on horseback gallop past across the field of view. As the rocky hill recedes, the camera follows the character past a line of wooden utility poles while a horse-drawn carriage passes by from the left. The scene then shifts as the dirt path leads directly toward a set of railroad tracks cutting across the landscape. Finally, the character steps off the trail and onto the wooden ties, following the rail line and the accompanying utility poles deep into the misty grassland.
